positive: A stylized, seamless repeating pattern featuring geometric mandalas intertwined with stylized celestial flora (moon phases, geometric stars, lunar flowers). The design must use clean, thick linework and strong black contrasts against a negative space background. The overall composition should be central, highly symmetrical, and minimalist, evoking a sense of cosmic balance and organic architecture. Style: Modern linocut graphic design, high contrast, single color palette (deep teal, gold foil, and black ink). Composition: Perfect vertical symmetry suitable for a centered apparel print. Lighting: Studio flat lay, perfect detail.
negative: blur, text, watermark, signature, logo, trademark, lowres, grainy, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cartoon, sketch, cursive, gradient, photorealistic
